title: Faith
question: Have I denied that I was a Catholic, or openly expressed my disbelief in any doctrine of the Catholic faith?

title: Faith
question: Have I refused to learn more about my Catholic faith when I had the opportunity?

title: Love Of God
question: Have I missed Sunday Mass without a serious reason, or tried to convince my parents to let me skip?

title: Prayer Life
question: Have I neglected daily prayer, or only prayed when I wanted something from God?

title: Faith
question: Have I been ashamed of my faith and hidden it from my friends or classmates?

title: Reverence for God
question: Have I taken God's name in vain, or used the names of Jesus or Mary as curse words?

title: Reverence for God
question: Have I used profanity, vulgar language, or crude humor habitually?

title: Duties of Children
question: Have I seriously disobeyed, disrespected, or defied my parents or guardians?

title: Duties of Children
question: Have I spoken rudely to my parents, yelled at them, or treated them with contempt?

title: Duties of Children
question: Have I disobeyed or disrespected my teachers or other adults in authority?

title: Love of Neighbor
question: Have I bullied, mocked, or deliberately excluded others at school or online?

title: Love of Neighbor
question: Have I engaged in cyberbullying — sending cruel messages, posting hurtful things, or sharing embarrassing content about others?

title: Love of Neighbor
question: Have I gossiped about others, spread rumors, or revealed secrets that were told to me in confidence?

title: Love of Neighbor
question: Have I given in to excessive anger, lost my temper, or been verbally cruel to siblings, friends, or classmates?

title: Love of Neighbor
question: Have I refused to forgive someone who hurt me, or deliberately held a grudge?

title: Truth
question: Have I lied to my parents, teachers, or others about important things?

title: Truth
question: Have I cheated on tests, homework, or school assignments?

title: Chastity
question: Have I viewed pornography or sexually explicit content online, in apps, or on social media?

title: Chastity
question: Have I committed the sin of masturbation?

title: Chastity
question: Have I deliberately entertained impure thoughts or fantasies?

title: Chastity
question: Have I engaged in sexual activity with another person outside of marriage?

title: Chastity
question: Have I sent or received sexually explicit images (sexting)?

title: Chastity
question: Have I been immodest in my dress or behavior to attract sexual attention?

title: Temperance
question: Have I used alcohol, marijuana, vaping, or other drugs?

title: Temperance
question: Have I pressured others to use drugs or alcohol, or gone along with peer pressure to do so?

title: Justice
question: Have I stolen anything — from a store, from my parents, from school, or from friends?

title: Justice
question: Have I pirated music, movies, games, or software instead of paying for them?

title: Justice
question: Have I deliberately damaged or been careless with other people's property?

title: Humility
question: Have I been excessively vain or obsessed with my appearance, social media image, or popularity?

title: Justice
question: Have I been envious or jealous of my friends' possessions, appearance, relationships, popularity, or grades?

title: Sloth
question: Have I wasted excessive time on video games, social media, or my phone instead of fulfilling my responsibilities?

title: Sloth
question: Have I been lazy about my schoolwork, chores, or responsibilities at home?

title: Love of Neighbor
question: Have I been mean to my brothers or sisters, or started fights with them?

title: Love of Neighbor
question: Have I stood by and done nothing when I saw someone being bullied or treated unfairly?

title: Faith
question: Have I consulted horoscopes, tarot cards, Ouija boards, or participated in occult practices?

title: Temperance
question: Have I been guilty of gluttony — overeating, binge eating, or being selfish with food?

title: Respect for Life
question: Have I intentionally harmed myself (cutting, self-harm) or had thoughts of suicide without seeking help?
counsels: Always seek help from a trusted adult, priest, or counselor.
prevention: Talk to a parent, teacher, or priest immediately.

title: Love of Neighbor
question: Have I judged others based on their appearance, race, social status, or popularity?

title: Love Of God
question: Have I received Holy Communion while in a state of mortal sin?

title: Love of Neighbor
question: Have I led or pressured others into sin — encouraging them to lie, cheat, steal, use substances, or be impure?
